name: Lorion

skills.name: Eternal
skills.description: Skill 2 or Ultimate hits also damage units near the target.

skills.name: Here's What I Think
skills.description: Lorion moves his orb around to damage units in its path.

skillsZh.name: 永續
skillsZh.description: 洛里昂的技能命中單位後，會對周圍造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 吾念所及
skillsZh.description: 洛里昂放出飛行物，並可操控飛行物，對沿路單位造成傷害。

tips: Build: Boots of the Arcane, Frozen Breath, Insatiable Tome.
tipsZh: 洛里昂（中路）：梯度 S+，勝率 50.67%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：祕法之靴、凝冰之息、噬神之書.

faqs.question: Is Lorion good in current season?
faqs.answer: Lorion is Tier S+ Mage with 50.67% win rate, 0.66% pick rate, and 2.98% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Lorion build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of the Arcane, Frozen Breath, Insatiable Tome, Venomous Staff, Mask of Agony, Savant's Wrath.

faqs.question: How to counter Lorion?
faqs.answer: Pick Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Strong into Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.

faqsZh.question: 洛里昂 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 洛里昂 為 S+ 梯度，勝率 50.67%、選取 0.66%、禁用 2.98%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 洛里昂 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：祕法之靴、凝冰之息、噬神之書、夢魘之牙、痛苦面具、博學者之怒.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 洛里昂？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。洛里昂 克制 Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable. Weak into: Data unavailable, Data unavailable, Data unavailable.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable；被克制：Data unavailable、Data unavailable、Data unavailable
